title: muhlenbergia capillaris
intro: Muhlenbergia capillaris, also known as hair grass or pink muhly grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as colds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of soothing coughs, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Muhlenbergia capillaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its extracts are sometimes used in traditional medicine.
